title: Legislative history & signing dates added
summary: Every statute now shows the Acts that enacted or amended it, with bill numbers, effective dates, and Governor signing dates (1999–2025), plus clickable citations.

title: Site launched
summary: An unofficial, searchable copy of the full Hawaii Revised Statutes — 14 volumes, 1,108 chapters, 19,840 sections — published. Statute text retrieved June 2026.
